name: Golf Digest Online Inc.
summary: Golf Digest Online Inc. engages in the e-commerce business in Japan and internationally. It operates GDO GOLF SHOP, an online golf shop that provides golf equipment. The company also buys and sells used golf equipment at store locations; and manages Golf lesson studio and a junior golf school. In addition, it provides golf course reservation services through the Internet, telephone, and mobile, as well as golf course sales support services. Further, the company engages in the Internet media business, which include providing golf news/information distribution, community services, etc. and provision of mobile services. Golf Digest Online Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
